creator: obrien@Nuxi.cs.ucdavis.edu
text:
The current Vim-3.0 port assumes you have X11R6 libraries around
	at compile/runtime.

	The current Vim-3.0 pkg assumes you have X11R6 libraries around
	at runtime.

	Currently the installed files do not adhear to hier(7).

Fix: Replace current pkg/PLIST and patches/patch-aa with the following:

PLIST:
bin/vim
share/misc/vim.hlp
share/man/man1/vim.1.gz

patch-aa:
How-To-Repeat: 
	n/a
